scope: Living evidence ledger and Phase 1 sample-size roadmap.

strict_public_denominator.old_614_exclusion_reason: The current strict public denominator counts only the blind-120 lane because it has its own blind packet bank, balanced truth split, runtime-manifest separation from scoring map, batch execution lock, trace-bound post-hoc scoring, and current claim boundary. Older 614-era evidence must not be combined with blind-120 for public FPR/FNR or Wilson claims unless re-admitted under the current strict rule.

phase1_wilson_target.plain_english: If Holo has zero observed misses, the Wilson 95% upper bound asks how high the true error rate could still plausibly be. With 381 clean packets on one side, the side-specific Wilson 95% upper bound is just under 1%, which is why Phase 1 targets 381 ALLOW and 381 ESCALATE packets.

strict_public_denominator_work.purpose: Build clean balanced ALLOW/ESCALATE packets toward 762 total.
strict_public_denominator_work.denominator_treatment: Public denominator only after freeze, clean runtime controls, and trace-bound scoring.
strict_public_denominator_work.provider_approval_status: Requires separate explicit approval per run.

internal_directional_rescue_work.purpose: Validate V5/V6 behavior on selected solo-failure rescue seams.
internal_directional_rescue_work.denominator_treatment: Internal-only; not public FPR/FNR or benchmark denominator.
internal_directional_rescue_work.provider_approval_status: V6 Tier 3 selected-lane rerun completed and passed internal repair gate; future live work needs separate explicit approval.

seam_mining_work.purpose: Find and audit new FN_FALSE_ALLOW / FP_OVERBLOCK candidates.
seam_mining_work.denominator_treatment: Candidate discovery only; no denominator credit by itself.
seam_mining_work.provider_approval_status: No provider approval from mining artifacts alone.

evidence_class_boundary.holo_failure_evidence: Holo rescue lanes that completed but failed the rescue objective.
evidence_class_boundary.patch_validation_evidence: Patch-validation runs only; not fresh benchmark evidence.
evidence_class_boundary.packet_key_defects: Quarantined and excluded from clean denominators.

tier1_v5.scope: patch validation only; no public denominator, no FPR/FNR claim, no complete-pair claim

quarantined_packet.reason: Expected ESCALATE depended on knowing that review cycle 2025-Q3 was stale, but runtime-visible sources did not explicitly define current_cycle=2026-Q3.

replacement_pair_result.scope: replacement supplement for quarantined pair; not public benchmark evidence

merged_clean_internal_gate.tier3_v5_scope: Internal directional FN rescue only; not public benchmark evidence and not a global FNR claim.

expected_full_hologov_calls_for_7_pair_p.accounting_rule: Build exactly 7 clean FN pairs / 14 packets unless a separate plan updates the denominator and provider-call math. An 8-pair run requires a new accounting plan.

latest_targeted_mining_solo_scout.commit: bef1da778 benchmark: preserve tier3 fn solo scout results
latest_targeted_mining_solo_scout.claim_boundary: Internal directional mining only; not public benchmark evidence and not a global FNR claim.

latest_targeted_mining_solo_scout2.commit: cce74288d benchmark: preserve tier3 fn scout2 solo results
latest_targeted_mining_solo_scout2.claim_boundary: Internal directional mining only; not public benchmark evidence and not a global FNR claim.

latest_targeted_mining_solo_scout3.claim_boundary: Internal directional FN rescue only; not public benchmark evidence and not a global FNR claim.

next_possible_moves: rerun the same 7-pair / 14-packet Tier 3 FN rescue lane under V6 after separate explicit approval
build a broader V6 validation set first before another live rescue run
not_allowed: running future Tier 3 FN or V6 live without separate explicit provider approval
using quarantined packet/key defects in the clean FN denominator
using the 70-call plan for an 8-pair / 16-packet run
making public benchmark or global FNR claims from Tier 3 FN rescue

tier3_v5_fn_holo_rescue_live_run.claim_boundary: Internal failed rescue evidence only; not a Holo win, not public benchmark evidence, not global FNR, and not FP precision evidence.

v6_tiny_scope_dependency_patch_validatio.commit: dcf44cd2b benchmark: preserve v6 scope dependency patch validation

v6_tier3_fn_holo_rescue_rerun.commit: 5c6e70063 benchmark: preserve v6 tier3 fn rerun evidence

current_scorecard.v6_tier3_selected_lane_rerun: passed on the same selected lane: 14/14 packets and 7/7 pairs
current_scorecard.interpretation: Supports the engineering hardening story, not a public reliability denominator.

packet_key_defects.reason: Runtime-visible sources omitted explicit current_cycle=2026-Q3 needed by key.
packet_key_defects.denominator_treatment: Excluded from clean packet denominator; entire pair excluded from clean pair denominator.

packet_key_defects.reason: Likely packet/key defect: ALLOW unsupported by visible sources.

underspecified_packets.reason: Stale-current-cycle trap underspecified because the packet did not expose the current cycle required to score the B-side ESCALATE key cleanly.

tier3_fn_exclusions.reason: Original B packet is a PACKET_KEY_DEFECT_CANDIDATE; replacement pair is Tier 2 supplement accounting, not a fresh Tier 3 candidate.
Quarantine recommended because the ALLOW key appears unsupported by visible sources.
Excluded from fresh Tier 3 FN rescue because readiness audit treats it as patch-validation-only, not fresh rescue evidence.

stale_or_invalid_lanes.treatment: Do not use as current public FPR/FNR denominator.
Preserved by execution lock; not denominator evidence.
Use raw score only with quarantine context.
Do not promote to public denominator without separate clean-denominator rule.
Internal failed rescue evidence only; not public benchmark evidence.
Do not promote to public denominator without a separate clean-denominator rule.
Internal selected-lane repair evidence only; not public benchmark evidence.

public_safe_claims: The current strict public denominator is the blind Holo lane: 120 packets, 60 ALLOW and 60 ESCALATE.
Holo scored 120/120 on that strict blind lane.
The Phase 1 target is 762 clean balanced packets: 381 ALLOW and 381 ESCALATE.
The old 614-packet denominator is historical/stale for current public denominator accounting unless re-admitted under the current strict rule.
Wilson upper bounds describe uncertainty after observing zero misses; they do not prove the true error rate is zero.
internal_only_claims: Solo Failure Factory totals and seam counts.
V5 Tier 2 raw 13/14, quarantine, replacement supplement, and merged clean internal gate.
Tier 2 internal gate restoration after the replacement pair.
Tier 3 V5 FN Holo rescue completed as an authorized runtime-valid selected-gate failure: 12/14 packets and 5/7 pairs.
V6 tiny scope-dependency patch-validation passed on 4/4 packets and 2/2 pairs.
V6 addresses the Tier 3 V5 miss class V5_SCOPE_DEPENDENCY_NON_DETECTION within the tiny patch-validation lane and the same selected Tier 3 rerun lane.
V6 Tier 3 FN rerun passed on the same selected lane that failed under V5: 14/14 packets and 7/7 pairs.
Tier 3 targeted-mining solo scout found 2 useful FN pairs, T3FN-MINE-006 and T3FN-MINE-010, for internal directional mining only.
Tier 3 targeted-mining solo Scout 2 found 1 useful FN pair, T3FN2-MINE-003, for internal directional mining only.
Tier 3 targeted-mining solo Scout 3 promoted 2 FN candidates, T3FN3-MINE-003 and T3FN3-MINE-009, for internal directional mining only.
Any future 7-pair / 14-packet full HoloGov Tier 3 FN rerun expects 70 provider calls: W1 x14, G1 x14, W2 x14, G2 x14, W3 x14.
forbidden_claims: The current public denominator is 614.
The old 614 and blind-120 can be combined for public FPR/FNR.
The Solo Failure Factory is public benchmark evidence.
V5 Tier 1 or Tier 2 proves global FPR/FNR.
Tier 2 rescue evidence proves FP precision.
The merged V5 Tier 2 internal gate is a public benchmark result.
HoloVerify has proven production reliability.
HoloVerify has zero true error rate.
HoloVerify beats all models.
Parse/admissibility-only failures are wrong-verdict failures.
Quarantined packet/key defects can stay in clean denominators.
Future Tier 3 FN or V6 rescue runs may run live without separate explicit approval.
Tier 3 FN rescue is public benchmark evidence.
Tier 3 FN rescue proves global FNR.
An 8-pair Tier 3 FN run can use the 70-call plan.
The Tier 2 replacement supplement creates a fresh Tier 3 candidate.
Five clean promoted FN pairs satisfy the seven-pair Tier 3 target.
The targeted-mining solo scout is public benchmark evidence.
The targeted-mining solo scout proves global FNR.
Scout 2 is public benchmark evidence.
Scout 2 proves global FNR.
Six clean promoted FN pairs satisfy the seven-pair Tier 3 target.
Scout 3 is public benchmark evidence.
Scout 3 proves global FNR.
The V6 tiny patch-validation pass is public benchmark evidence.
The V6 tiny patch-validation pass proves global FNR or FP precision.
The V6 Tier 3 selected-lane rerun is public benchmark evidence.
The V6 Tier 3 selected-lane rerun proves global FNR or FP precision.
The V6 Tier 3 selected-lane rerun proves general model superiority.
V6 has been validated broadly beyond the tiny patch-validation and selected-lane rerun evidence.

what_is_proven: The strict public scorecard is still the blind-120 lane: 120/120 packets, balanced 60 ALLOW and 60 ESCALATE.
V5 found the selected-lane failure: the Tier 3 FN rescue run was real, authorized, and runtime-valid, but it failed at 12/14 packets and 5/7 pairs.
V6 patched the failure class and the same selected Tier 3 lane now passes at 14/14 packets and 7/7 pairs.
what_is_not_proven: V6 has not yet proved a broad benchmark improvement.
V6 has not created a new public denominator.
V6 has not proved global FNR reduction, FP precision, or general HoloVerify superiority.
what_changed_with_v6: The deterministic layer now checks the source-field authority/scope dependency that V5 missed on the two Tier 3 B-side failures.
The tiny validation passed first, then the full same-set Tier 3 rerun passed under V6.
This supports the engineering hardening story, not a public reliability denominator.
next_two_possible_moves: Build a broader V6 validation set first, so the next live run tests the patch beyond the two known miss pairs.
Keep Phase 1 strict public denominator work separate and continue only with clean blind/balanced packets.
